pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_nx_witness.sh lines 9, 269, 320 and task_utils.sh line 4; used consistently throughout all API calls in the environment
Confirmed in setup_nx_witness.sh lines 59, 67, 104, 106, 112 and task_utils.sh line 16; 'admin' is the default superuser in Nx Witness VMS
Confirmed in setup_nx_witness.sh line 7 (NX_ADMIN_PASS), setup_task.sh line 7, and task_utils.sh line 5; set during system initialization with /rest/v1/system/setup API call
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 74 where file is removed, and in export_result.sh lines 20 and 26 where file is checked; matches user 'ga' home directory from env.json

Network Optix documentation confirms sessionLimitMinutes is a real Nx Witness setting for session timeout (https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles/360035832554-How-does-Auto-Discovery-work); value of 15 minutes is typical security hardening practice

Network Optix documentation confirms autoDiscoveryEnabled is a real Nx Witness setting for automatic camera discovery (https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles/360035832554-How-does-Auto-Discovery-work); disabling is common security hardening to prevent unauthorized device discovery
Not found in official Nx Witness documentation or public API references; referenced in setup_task.sh line 24 and verifier.py line 30; may be synthetic/benchmark-specific setting
Not found in official Nx Witness documentation or public API references; referenced in setup_task.sh line 25 and verifier.py line 31; may be synthetic/benchmark-specific setting

Not found in official Nx Witness documentation or public API references; referenced in setup_task.sh line 26 and verifier.py line 32; may be synthetic/benchmark-specific setting for testing deprecated API disabling

privileged_info_summary: The Nx Witness VMS server is running on localhost:7001 with admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. Two of the five required security settings (sessionLimitMinutes and autoDiscoveryEnabled) are real Nx Witness configuration parameters confirmed in official Network Optix documentation. The report file path is /home/ga/security_hardening_report.txt. Three settings (trafficEncryptionForced, statisticsAllowed, insecureDeprecatedApiEnabled) could not be verified in any public documentation and may be synthetic settings created for this benchmark task. The API endpoint /rest/v1/system/settings is used throughout the environment setup for system configuration.
